name: Veggie Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Vegetable pieces (broccoli, Cauliflower, Mushrooms, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the egg whites and yolks.
2. Whip the whites until stiff but not dry; set aside.
3. Mix the yogurt, yolks, cheese, vegetables, onion, pepper, and herbs in a bowl; set aside.
4. In a large skillet, sauté the onion, vegetables, and herbs until tender.
5. Add the cheese mixture to the skillet with the vegetables.
6. Gently fold in the whipped egg whites.
7. Pour the filling into a pie crust pan.
8. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
